baseline_problem: Exp01 showed limited macro-F1, suggesting weak minority-class learning with EfficientNet-B0 and weighted cross-entropy.
exp02_upgrade: Exp02 uses a stronger ConvNeXt-Tiny backbone, larger 384x384 images, and weighted focal loss to improve hard minority-class learning.
mathematical_objective: Minimize weighted focal loss over five DR classes.
main_novelty_protected: The novelty is not the backbone. The novelty is the later SafeDR-Agent policy that transforms classification outputs into safety-aware clinical actions.
